insights.title: Labor overran budget by 36.3%
insights.finding: Total labor actual $583,483 vs budget $428,030 — $155,453 unfavorable variance. Review crew mix and productivity.

insights.title: Largest variance — cost code 230 (Finish Material) under by $145,602
insights.finding: Budget $483,149, actual $337,547 (-30.1%). Flag for bid calibration.

direct_cost.source: Σ labor + material + OH + burden + tax
